card.name: Aaron's Reproach
card.text: Target artifact becomes a 4/4 Snake creature with deathtouch until end of turn. It's still an artifact.

card.name: Elisha's Justice
card.text: Destroy all creatures with power 2 or less and all tokens. Create a 3/3 Green Bear Token with Trample.

card.name: Centurion
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this creature. Prevent all damage dealt to up to one target creature. If Jesus is on the battlefiled, return Centurion to your hand When this creature dies, send it to Heaven.

card.name: Judas
card.text: {T}, When this creature enters, create two Treasure Tokens. {1}, {T}: Sacrifice this creature. Destroy target Legendary Creature or Planeswalker. Create two Treasure Tokens. When this creature dies, send it to Hell.

card.name: Sodom
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add a Salt counter to this land. {T}, {4}: Remove 4 Salt counters from Sodom. Sacrifice it. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Walk on Water
Adam's Rib
card.text: {T}: Add {CC}. Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 2/2 Green and White Human Token named Eve.

card.name: Judas' Kiss
card.text: Put a Finality counter on target creature. If that creature is Legendary, create two treasure tokens.

card.name: Smite the Fig Tree
card.text: Destroy target Forest, Artifact, or creature with Flying.

card.name: Serenity
card.text: Exile all creatures from target player's graveyard. Draw a card and lose one life.

card.name: Pontius Pilate
card.text: When this creature enters, put a Finality counter on target creature opponent controls. If that creature is legendary, gain RRR. When this creature dies, send it to Limbo.

card.name: Dorcas
card.text: When this creature enters, gain two life. {T}: Target creature with power 2 or less gains indestructible until end of turn

card.name: Lazarus
card.text: When a Legendary creature or Plansewalker enters, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefiled tapped

card.name: Sermon on the Mount
card.text: When this card enters, create a Food token, a Clue token, and a Treasure token. Creatures you control have Inspire (When an Inspired creature dies, create a Food token)

card.name: Mary
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 Infant token named Jesus with indestructible. This creature cannot attack. When this creature dies, send it to Heaven.

card.name: Peter's Call
card.text: Chose one: Create 3 1/1 Rooster tokens with haste. Gain 3 life. Create a food token.

card.name: Jesus' Sandals
Reverse Animate
card.text: Send two target creatures from your graveyard into Heaven, Hell or Limbo. Chose a destination for each.

card.name: Douse the Lintels
card.text:
As an additional cost to play this card, pay 1 life or sacrifice a creature. Vanishing 3. You have Protection from Curses. You gain 2 life each turn. 1/1 and 2/2 Creatures you control have Hexproof.
Enchantment BR 2
BIB
